name: Jira Align Client
description: Read and query Jira Align (Atlassian Cloud or self-hosted/on-prem) via the REST API 2.0 using a Personal API Token. Exposes get/list/search/raw subcommands with OData-style filtering, selection, expansion, ordering, and automatic pagination. The agent never sees the token.
author: dropkit

input.arguments: a subcommand and its arguments (e.g., list epics --filter "state eq 'In Progress'" --limit 50 --output epics.json)

env.JIRAALIGN_BASE_URL: Base URL. Cloud: https://<site>.jiraalign.com. On-prem: https://jiraalign.corp.example.com
env.JIRAALIGN_API_TOKEN: Personal API Token from Jira Align Profile page — populated by setup_credentials.sh, never passed on CLI
env.JIRAALIGN_FLAVOR: Optional: cloud | onprem (auto-detected from URL by default; auth is identical either way)

output.layout: JSON to stdout by default; --output writes to a file in the chosen --format
